nodes.name: Ptiloprora
nodes.summary: Ptiloprora（Ptiloprora）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Leaden honeyeater、Yellowish-streaked honeyeater、Rufous-sided honeyeater等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Leaden honeyeater
nodes.summary: Leaden honeyeater（Ptiloprora plumbea）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Leaden honeyeater。

nodes.name: Mayr's honeyeater
nodes.summary: Mayr's honeyeater（Ptiloprora mayri）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mayr's honeyeater。

nodes.name: Rufous-sided honeyeater
nodes.summary: Rufous-sided honeyeater（Ptiloprora erythropleura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rufous-sided honeyeater。

nodes.name: Grey-streaked honeyeater
nodes.summary: Grey-streaked honeyeater（Ptiloprora perstriata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Grey-streaked honeyeater。

nodes.name: Yellowish-streaked honeyeater
nodes.summary: Yellowish-streaked honeyeater（Ptiloprora meekiana）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellowish-streaked honeyeater。

nodes.name: Rufous-backed honeyeater
nodes.summary: Rufous-backed honeyeater（Ptiloprora guisei）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rufous-backed honeyeater。
